race.name: Marcialonga Bodo
race.tagline: Arctic Norway meets Italian racing heritage — a Ski Classics Pro Tour marathon above the Arctic Circle.

vitals.registration: Open registration via Ski Classics and race website
vitals.prize_purse: Ski Classics Pro Tour points (300-point category)
vitals.aid_stations: Multiple aid stations along the course

climate.description: Bodo sits just above the Arctic Circle on the Norwegian coast. Temperatures on race day typically range from -10°C to 0°C. Maritime influence moderates extremes but can bring variable conditions including wind and precipitation.
challenges: Arctic coastal winds can create challenging conditions
Variable snow quality due to maritime climate influence
Cold temperatures at higher elevations on the course
Daylight still limited in late March at 67°N latitude

course.primary: Start and finish at Bestemorenga near Bodo city center, with the elite race finishing at Junkerfjellet. Varied Arctic terrain combining coastal and mountain elements.
course.surface: Machine-groomed classic tracks through varied Arctic terrain
course.grooming: Ski Classics Pro Tour standard grooming
features: Start at Bestemorenga near Bodo city center
Arctic landscape above the Arctic Circle
Ski Classics Pro Tour 300-point category event
Multiple distance options including 6km family race

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: A new but high-profile Ski Classics Pro Tour event bringing elite racing to the Arctic. Strong prestige and international draw from series membership, offset by remote location and limited history.
nordic_lab_rating.tier_note: Prestige 4 promotes one tier: raw score 67 (T2) stays T2

history.summary: Marcialonga Bodo is a relatively new addition to the Ski Classics calendar, launched as a Challengers event in 2024 and elevated to full Pro Tour status in 2025. The race brings the storied Marcialonga brand from the Italian Dolomites to the Arctic coast of Northern Norway, creating a unique hybrid of Italian racing tradition and Norwegian ski culture.
notable_facts: Launched in 2024 as a Ski Classics Challengers event
Elevated to full Ski Classics Pro Tour status in 2025
Extends the Marcialonga brand from Italy to Arctic Norway
One of the northernmost Ski Classics Pro Tour events
300-point category in the Pro Tour standings

videos.title: Testing Bodø: Marcialonga Arctic Ski Race
videos.description:
Testing Bodø is Visit Bodø's new series about the activities and life up in Northern Norway. We are testing everything from local restaurant dishes to climbing in the world's northernmost Via Ferrata and learning about the old trading boats that are stored in Bodø and Salten.  

Learn more about Bodø: 
https://visitbodo.com/en/

ABOUT
Visit Bodø is the official destination company and travel inspiration to Bodø and the Salten region in Northern Norway.

CONNECT
Web: https://www.visitbodo.com
